title: Nexus 5X vs iPhone 6 : Raise and Shoot
content:
Gave the cameras on Nexus 5X and iPhone 6 a try. Let the phones do the thinking, raise the phones and take the shots. The HDR was off and no post processing.

![Nexus got better color but iPhone got the sky.](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_00.jpg)

![Photo from the iPhone looks nice and warm.](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_01.jpg)

![This time photo from Nexus looks warmer. It has wider background to measure the light?](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_02.jpg)

![A couple steps closer ... iPhone photo is warmer. The difference is not much but noticeable.](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_03.jpg)

![Again...](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_04.jpg)

![And again...](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2016/03/nexus5x_iphone6_05.jpg)

I like the color produced by the iPhone's camera. But overall, both cameras are good.
